queries.question: Show me the services every bank offers.
queries.sql: SELECT Services.serviceName  from Banks_Services join Services on Banks_Services.serviceId = Services.id join Banks on Banks_Services.bankId = Banks.id   GROUP BY Banks_Services.serviceId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Banks_Services.bankId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Banks)

queries.question: Show me the services every bank offers.
queries.sql: select banks.name , services.servicename from Banks_Services join Services on Banks_Services.serviceId = Services.id join Banks on Banks_Services.bankId = Banks.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?servicename WHERE {
  ?banks_services a :Banks_Services .
  ?services a :Services .
  ?banks_services p:hasServices ?services .
  ?banks a :Banks .
  ?banks_services p:hasBanks ?banks .
  ?banks p:name ?name .
  ?services p:serviceName ?servicename .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the services every bank offers.
